[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010101 3
1 0100100 2
2 0111111 6
3 0000101 2
4 1110111 6
5 1000101 3
6 1010101 4
7 1000000 1

01 10 0100100 2 match 1
12 21 0000101 2 match 3
23 32 0000101 2 match 3
34 43 1000001 2
45 54 1000001 2
56 65 1010100 3
67 76 0010000 1
70 07 0000000 a

02 20 0000100 1
13 31 0100111 4
24 42 0000001 1
35 53 1000101 3 match 5
46 64 1000000 1 match 7
57 75 0010000 1
60 06 0100100 2 match 1
71 17 0011000 2

03 30 0100100 2 match 1
14 41 0001001 2
25 52 0000101 2 match 3
36 63 1100110 4
47 74 0001000 1
50 05 0000100 1
61 16 0110110 4
72 27 0000000 a

04 40 0000000 a
15 51 0010101 3 match 0
26 62 0000100 1
37 73 0000000 a
